config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I believe individual rights should be the default priority, because once society is allowed to override them too easily, abuse becomes very likely. In my view, a healthy society protects people by limiting power, not by asking individuals to sacrifice their dignity whenever the majority wants it. Social interests matter, but they should not automatically come before basic rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis didahulukan daripada hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami sendiri menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak kuasa atas individu, hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan, diskriminasi, dan pembatasan kebebasan yang sulit dibalikkan. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi justru masyarakat yang sehat adalah yang melindungi hak dasar bahkan saat itu tidak nyaman bagi mayoritas. Bagi saya, prioritas yang benar adalah hak individu sebagai batas, lalu kepentingan sosial dipertimbangkan di dalam batas itu, bukan sebaliknya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because in Indonesia we have seen how easily “the common good” can be used to pressure minorities, silence criticism, or excuse abuse by those in power. At the same time, I do not believe individual rights are absolute in every situation; public health, safety, and anti-corruption rules can justify limits when they are fair, narrow, and accountable. The real issue is not choosing society over the individual, but making sure society cannot trample basic rights just because a majority says it is for the public good.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena di Amerika saya melihat terlalu banyak contoh ketika “kepentingan masyarakat” dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan kebebasan, diskriminasi, atau penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Saya setuju bahwa hak individu tidak absolut dalam setiap situasi, misalnya untuk kesehatan publik atau keselamatan, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Yang saya tolak adalah logika bahwa masyarakat secara otomatis lebih penting daripada individu, karena begitu standar itu diterima, minoritas dan orang yang tidak populer biasanya yang paling dulu dirugikan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang benar-benar sehat justru diukur dari kemampuannya melindungi hak dasar bahkan saat itu tidak nyaman bagi mayoritas.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the statement as a general rule, because in Indonesia the phrase "society first" is too often used to justify pressure, conformity, and abuse by authorities or majorities. Public interests do matter, especially for health, safety, and corruption control, but they must be limited, specific, and accountable rather than used to erase basic rights. From my perspective, a society is stronger when it protects individuals from being sacrificed for vague collective goals, not when it treats individual dignity as secondary.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, memberi prioritas otomatis pada kepentingan masyarakat terlalu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk menekan minoritas dan memperluas kuasa pemerintah. Saya tidak menyangkal bahwa ada situasi tertentu seperti kesehatan publik, keselamatan, atau pencegahan kejahatan ketika pembatasan hak bisa dibenarkan, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa diawasi. Yang saya tidak terima adalah gagasan bahwa “demi masyarakat” sudah cukup untuk mengalahkan hak individu, karena justru di situ penyalahgunaan paling sering terjadi. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin membatasi kekuasaannya sendiri.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
